issues.description: Missing condition for 'rest this Leader' requirement. The effect should only trigger if the Leader can be rested, which requires a condition check or cost specification.
Missing filter for card type. PlayFromHand action must include type filter for 'Character' cards, not just subType.
Missing DON!! cost/requirement. The effect requires 'DON!! −1' as a cost, which should be represented as a cost or condition in the DSL structure.
